name: codex-linkedin-job-assistant
description: Prompt-first Codex plugin for job search, LinkedIn referrals, resume tailoring, and applications.

interface.shortDescription: Manage job search, referrals, resumes, and applications from local files.
interface.longDescription: A prompt-first Codex plugin that uses Markdown workflows and templates to run a local job-search workspace with LinkedIn outreach, referral handling, resume tailoring guidance, application folders, and tracker updates.
